description.p: AsyncAO is a fast, native Attorney Online 2 client: zero-fallback asset streaming (one network probe per asset, formats learned per server), a zero-allocation render loop under a tight memory budget, and full AO2 pairing. It connects to WebSocket (ws:// / wss://) servers.

Features include the full courtroom (shouts, evidence, pairing, judge penalty bars), a live player list, moderation tools, a music jukebox, a scene recorder / replay studio, per-server transcript logs with search, and extensive theming and accessibility options.
